1.text: How do you like to learn? Option 1. Watching and looking at things. Option 2. Listening to someone explain. Option 3. Doing it with my hands. Option 4. Reading on my own.

2.text: What helps you understand something best? Option 1. Seeing a picture or example. Option 2. Hearing it explained out loud. Option 3. Trying it myself first. Option 4. Reading it carefully.

3.text: How long can you focus before needing a break? Option 1. About 5 minutes. Option 2. About 10 minutes. Option 3. About 15 minutes or more.

4.text: What do you do when something feels too hard? Option 1. Take a break and come back. Option 2. Keep trying until I get it. Option 3. Ask someone for help.

5.text: What kind of work do you prefer? Option 1. Easy and straightforward. Option 2. A little bit challenging. Option 3. Really hard and complex.
